articles.title: Russell Coker: ECC and DDR5
articles.description:
Hamming Codes
ECC RAM corrects errors that occur in memory before it gets to the CPU. The most common form of ECC is the Hamming Code [1] which when it has R redundant bits can correct single bit errors and detect double-bit errors in messages with 2^R-R-1 bi…
